hero.title: Welcome to Jedligram!
hero.description: Discover and join communities that share your interests.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Jedligram account.
login.generic_error: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

verification.title: Two-Factor Authentication
verification.subtitle: Please check your email for the verification code.
verification.empty_fields_error: Email and verification code are required.

createCommunity.title: Create Community
createCommunity.description: Enter the basic information. You can modify it anytime later.
createCommunity.description_tip: Tip: describe what the community is about and who it's for in a few sentences.
createCommunity.info_text: The community will appear in the list, and others can join.
createCommunity.disclaimer: By clicking Create, you accept the community guidelines.
createCommunity.validation_error: Please fill in all required fields!
createCommunity.image_tip: Tip: Choose an image that represents the community.
createCommunity.header_tip: Tip: Choose a header image that represents the community.

allCommunities.title: Communities
allCommunities.description: Explore topics, join conversations, and find your place.
allCommunities.default_description: Join weekly events, share strategies, and enjoy friendly competition.

createPost.title: New Post
createPost.description: Share your thoughts with the community
createPost.image_upload_description: Drag an image here, or click to select one
createPost.info_text: The post will appear in the community feed.

communities.featured_description: Explore the most active communities and join your favorites.
communities.no_results_description: Check all communities or create a new one.

welcome_banner.AllCommunitydescription: Discover communities, join conversations, and find your place!
welcome_banner.CommunityDescription: Explore topics, join conversations, and share your thoughts

user_profile.logout_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to log out?

edit_profile.drag_picture_text: Drag new profile picture here or click to select.
edit_profile.save_profile_description: Are you sure you want to save profile changes?
edit_profile.invalid_data_description:
Email and name fields cannot be empty! Email must be in valid format!
The length of the fields cannot exceed the specified limit!
edit_profile.two_fa_confirm_description: Two factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a second form of identification in addition to your password.
edit_profile.dark_mode_subtitle: Switch to dark theme for a better experience

comment_section.no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

post_list.title: Posts
post_list.no_posts: No posts yet. Be the first to create a post!

deleted.title: This community is no longer available
deleted.description: This community has been deleted and is no longer accessible. It may have been removed by the community owner or an administrator.

dragNdrop.default_description: Or click the button to choose a file.
dragNdrop.file_too_large_error: File size cannot be larger than {{size}} MB.
